evals.name: gemini-chat-controls
evals.prompt: Extract a Gemini paste with user prompts, answer action controls, source links, and a Drive file chip.

expectations.text: Response uses Gemini answer controls and composer boundaries as role evidence.
Response catalogs the Drive file chip separately from message text.
Response labels source links as source traces.

evals.expected_output: A standalone platform-tuned thread-context extract for the gemini-chat-controls scenario that satisfies all four evidence-anchored expectations.

evals.name: gemini-canvas-research
evals.prompt: The Gemini conversation references a Canvas app and a Deep Research report with charts and a diagram, but the paste contains only summaries and titles.

expectations.text: Response treats Canvas and Deep Research as separate surfaces.
Response catalogs the app, report, charts, and diagram as content elements.
Response assigns referenced-not-supplied fidelity to absent bodies.
Response does not reconstruct unavailable visual contents.

evals.expected_output: A standalone platform-tuned thread-context extract for the gemini-canvas-research scenario that satisfies all four evidence-anchored expectations.

evals.name: gemini-gem-context
evals.prompt: Normalize a Gemini Gem thread where the Gem name is visible but its instructions and Workspace grounding are absent.

expectations.text: Response records the Gem name only as supplied.
Response marks Gem instructions not supplied or unknown.
Response marks Workspace grounding not supplied or unknown.
Response does not infer product context from response style.

evals.expected_output: A standalone platform-tuned thread-context extract for the gemini-gem-context scenario that satisfies all four evidence-anchored expectations.
